name: Mini Cheesecakes (Phillies Free)
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz.) Philadelphia cream cheese, softened
1 cup assorted cut-up fruit or reduced-calorie cherry pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Place wafers, flat side down, in the bottom of each of 12 paper-lined muffin cups.
2. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
3. Add eggs; mix just until blended. Do not overbeat after adding eggs.
4. Pour mixture over wafers, filling each cup.
5. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes. Cool before removing from pan. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
6. Top with fruit just before serving.
Variations:
- Lemon: Stir 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice and 3/4 teaspoon grated lemon peel into the batter.
- Pumpkin: Mix 3/4 cup canned pumpkin, 3/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon, and a dash of each ground cloves and nutmeg with the cream cheese. Omit fruit.
- Cherry: Omit fruit. Top with 1 can (20 oz.) reduced-calorie cherry pie filling before serving.
- Quick Crust: Substitute 1 (9 oz.) ready-to-use graham cracker crust for crumbs. Adds an extra serving size.
- Honey Crunch: Omit sugar. Mix 1/2 cup honey with the cream cheese. Omit fruit. Top with 3/4 cup low-fat granola cereal; drizzle with 1 tablespoon honey before serving.
